content.en:
Ye Tian's palace.

The Lord of the Wind Fangs and the Lord of the Ice and Rain sit here.

"Endless Lord, you want to storm the Origin Upper Realm?"

The Lord of the Wind Fangs asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian said lightly: "I can't enter now, so I'm ready to attack the Origin Upper Realm." "

"How many of your other shore origin rules are there, and how many other shore origin rules are there?" the Lord of Ice and Rain asked.

Ye Tian said: "The origin rules of the other side are ninety into four realms, and the origin of the other side is 2.3 million!"

When the Lord of Wind Fang heard this, he was immediately surprised.

That's a fast ascension, isn't it?

At this time, the Lord of Ice Rain said again: "Even so, the chance of you breaking through is only fifty percent!"

Under normal circumstances, the other side of the origin rule breaks through to the ninety percent two realm, and if the other side of the origin reaches 2 million, the probability of breaking through is about one percent of the realm.

If the origin of the other side breaks through to the realm of ninety percent of three, and the origin of the other side is more than 2 million, there is about a twenty percent chance of breaking through to the origin of the upper realm.

Like Chen Yang, the origin of the other side has reached the realm of ninety percent and four, the origin of the other side is 2.3 million, and the complete golden body of the other side has been condensed, and if all other aspects reach the limit, there is about a fifty percent chance.

"Fifty percent chance is enough!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Lord of Ice and Rain reminded: "Endless Lord, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, once it fails, there will be no way to impact the Origin Upper Realm for millions of primeval years. And within 100 million primeval eras, the chance of breakthrough will decrease. Only after a long period of time will the chance of breakthrough return to the fifty percent realm again! Your growth speed is very fast, there is no need to hit the Origin Ascending Realm so quickly. At the very least, you have to collect some treasures that can make the other side of the origin boil, so that at least you can make the chance of breaking through a little higher. "

There are very few resources that are helpful to the impact of the Origin Middle Realm on the Origin Upper Realm, and the Origin Whale Oil is a kind of.

But what can have an effect on Ye Tian is at least the whale oil of the Origin Black Whale in the Origin Middle Realm, and this kind of Origin Black Whale is very rare, and it only appears when the Origin Black River is at wave, and it usually sleeps at the bottom of the Origin Black River, and it cannot be found at all.

And.

Origin Black Whale Whale Oil is very scarce, even if other forces have it, it is almost not enough, and it has long been used.

Last time, at the Xuanyin Giant City Trade Fair, no one sold this resource.

"Lord of Wind Fangs, Lord of Ice and Rain, although I don't have the Origin Middle Realm Origin Black Whale Whale Oil, I am confident that I will succeed in impacting the Origin Upper Realm!" Ye Tian said.

Then.

The Lord of Wind Tooth sighed and said: "In the last tens of millions of primeval eras, several Origin Middle Realms on Wind Tooth Island have impacted the Origin Upper Realm, and the resources that help to impact the Origin Upper Realm have been almost used, otherwise I can give you a copy, and now you can only rely on yourself!"

"Thank you for your concern, the Lord of Wind and Rain, I have a full breakthrough!"

Ye Tian didn't say much.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Windfang and the Lord of the Ice and Rain are gone.

...

Afterwards.

Ye Tian announced the retreat and opened the Great Array, not allowing any Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to snoop on.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian used the Origin Rules of the Other Shore to try to make his Origin of the Other Shore boil, and then impact the Origin Upper Realm.

Time passes.

After a long time, the other side of the origin is boiling, but the degree of boiling is not enough, whether it can break through depends on the probability.

Click!

The other side of the source began to crack, and the signs of boiling fell silent.

This is a breakthrough failure!

Burst!

Ye Tian vomited blood, and his whole body was cracking.

This is not a trivial injury, but it takes a while to recover.

However, the cracks in the origin of the other side are difficult to heal, and it will take at least hundreds of millions of primeval epochs to fully recover.

If you don't recover, even if you can continue to impact the Origin Ascending Realm in the past millions of primeval eras, the chance of success will be very low!

There may be a treasure that restores the origin of the other side, but such an arcane treasure is too rare.

"There is a fifty percent chance that I will fail to break through, and there are some reasons why I don't pay attention to it!"

If he had prepared a little more resources to help, he might have succeeded.

He didn't care, though.

He directly annihilated this replica body, re-copied a new replica body, and continued to impact the Origin Upper Realm.

All along, he didn't worry about the chance of breaking through, he just wanted to have a deeper chance in the Origin Middle Realm, and after breaking through, his strength would be even stronger.

That's all!

The new copy of the body was copied, and he continued to attack the Origin Upper Realm.

This time.

His luck was not so bad.

Soon.

The boiling speed of his origin on the other side became faster and faster, and an incomparably huge phantom seemed to sit cross-legged on the entire endless island.

Bang!!!!

The origin of the land on the other side of eternity came, and Ye Tian's phantom seemed to absorb the origin of the land on the other side of eternity.

Endless energy poured into his body, allowing his body to break through from the Origin Middle Realm to the Origin Upper Realm.

Whew!!

A Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Middle Realm came over.

The Lord of the Wind Fang, the Lord of the Ice and Rain, the Lord of the Cave Xuan, and the Lord of the Qin Sound have all come.

At this moment, when they saw the signs of Ye Tian's breakthrough, they were immediately very excited.

"Endless Lord, it's really broken through!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain was shocked.

Thinking back to when Ye Tian had just joined Fengya Island, it seemed that it was not far away.

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian grew up so fast.

At this time.

The lord of the White Capital was devastated.

Last time, he failed to break through, but he didn't expect Ye Tian to break through successfully, and it seemed to be very easy, without any waves.

In his eyes, Ye Tian's growth process was too smooth, and his growth speed was also the envy of countless Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

This guy is simply a demon!

Not only are these Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors envious, but those Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestors are also envious!

One of the other shore-level geniuses who followed Ye Tianlai, the Lord of Tiandu, was originally known as the first shore-level genius in the Taichao Domain, and also the first-shore-level genius in the entire eastern region.

Now, he is only in the Origin Realm, and he is not too demonic, and he is not excellent in the Origin Realm of Fengya Island.

As a result, the Infinity Lord, who came at the same time as him, had grown to one of the top beings on Wind Tooth Island, and he could kill him countless times with his breath.

Thinking of this, he was not only envious, but also shocked to the point that he was not arrogant at all.

Time passes slowly.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's breakthrough vision finally passed.

However, he is still in the stable realm, so he has not gone out.

But the news that he had broken through to become the Origin Upper Realm was still known to a few Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Middle Realm in the east.

Taichao Domain.

When the Lord of Chaos learned of this news, he was immediately shocked.
